name: French Toast
instructions: 1. Whisk the milk, eggs, vanilla, cinnamon, and salt together in a shallow bowl until combined and smooth. 2. Lightly butter a griddle or skillet and heat over medium-high heat. 3. Soak each slice of bread in egg mixture, about 5 to 10 seconds per side, allowing it to absorb the mixture without becoming soggy. 4. Transfer to the hot skillet and cook until golden brown and slightly crisp, 3 to 4 minutes per side. 5. Serve hot and enjoy with the butter and syrup.
simpleInstructions: 1. Mix the milk, eggs, vanilla, cinnamon, and salt. 2. Soak bread in mixture. 3. Cook on a buttered skillet until golden. 4. Serve hot with the butter and syrup.
